description:
Phase 4 of fz-ul4.23. Extract jit-agnostic Cranelift lowering from ir_codegen.rs into a backend core, parameterized on cranelift_module::Module. Prep for AOT (Phase 6) and a uniform --emit (Phase 3).

## Deliverables

- New module backend/ (or codegen_core.rs) with the IR→Cranelift lowering, generic over `M: cranelift_module::Module`.
- ir_codegen.rs becomes the JIT driver: picks JITModule, finalizes, owns the Process/Runtime FFI symbol bindings.
- All existing JIT tests pass unchanged.
- Spans/SourceLoc plumbing lives in core so --emit works for any driver.

## Non-goals

- AOT driver itself (Phase 6).
- Behavioral changes to codegen.

## Acceptance

- ir_codegen.rs shrinks substantially; the new core file contains the bulk of the codegen.
- Test suite green, no perf regression on the JIT fixture matrix.
- The shape supports a second driver (AOT) being added in ~200 lines.
title: Factor ir_codegen into backend core + JIT driver
